pi_items.source: BLS SOC code 13-1111 'Management Analysts' covers management consulting activities. Task involves rebranding a consulting pitch deck, which is core management consulting work.
Confirmed in memo (section 6 SAVE), task description, setup_task.sh (rm -f line), export_result.sh (OUTPUT_PPTX variable), and verifier.py. All four files agree on this path.

Confirmed in setup_task.sh (PPTX_PATH variable in python code and launch_wps_with_file call), export_result.sh (ORIGINAL_PPTX variable), task description, and memo (section 6 references it). Live tested: file exists at 54,485 bytes after setup.

Independently verified by running setup_task.sh python code locally and counting slides with python-pptx: len(prs.slides) == 25. Also confirmed via live environment SSH: 'Slide count: 25'. The slides_data list in setup_task.sh has exactly 25 entries.

Arithmetic: 25 original slides + 1 new 'At a Glance' slide - 0 deleted slides = 26. The memo instructs moving slides (not adding/removing) for steps 1-3, adds 1 new slide in step 4, and removes 0 slides. Verified the verifier checks output_slide_count == 26.

Independently verified by creating the PPTX with python-pptx and scanning all slide titles. Slides 20-23 have these exact titles in this exact order. The setup_task.sh slides_data comments on lines 224, 234, 244, 256 confirm: '# Slide 20 — Our Team: Leadership', '# Slide 21 — Our Team: Senior Partners', '# Slide 22 — Our Team: Industry Experts', '# Slide 23 — Our Team: Client Engagement'.

Independently verified by creating the PPTX and iterating slides: the 4 slides whose titles start with 'Our Team:' are at 1-indexed positions [20, 21, 22, 23]. Cross-referenced with slides_data list in setup_task.sh which has 25 entries; entries at 0-indexed [19, 20, 21, 22] are the Our Team slides, corresponding to 1-indexed [20, 21, 22, 23].

pi_items.metadata_value: Meridian Strategy Group: At a Glance
pi_items.verified_value: Meridian Strategy Group: At a Glance
pi_items.source: Confirmed in the memo text (section 4): 'Title it "Meridian Strategy Group: At a Glance"'. Also confirmed in verifier.py which checks for 'at a glance' in slide title (case-insensitive). The export_result.sh checks for the same string.

Confirmed in the memo text (section 5): 'CONFIDENTIAL — Meridian Strategy Group 2024'. The export_result.sh checks for both 'CONFIDENTIAL' (partial) and 'Meridian Strategy Group 2024' (full match). The verifier uses footer_full_match_count for scoring.

privileged_info_summary: The original presentation 'apex_pitch_deck.pptx' has exactly 25 slides created by python-pptx. 'Apex Consulting Partners' appears in 5 slides: slide 1 (title: 'Apex Consulting Partners — Strategic Growth Advisory'), slide 2 (body: '1. About Apex Consulting Partners'), slide 3 (title: 'About Apex Consulting Partners'), slide 13 (body: testimonials mentioning 'Apex Consulting Partners' twice), and slide 25 (body: 'Apex Consulting Partners' and 'contact@apexconsulting.com'). Slide 12 ('Case Study: Revenue Impact') has a 6-row x 5-column table. Three cells have wrong values: cell row 'Client Revenue (Post)' col 'Q2 2024' shows '$14.9M' (should be '$15.6M'), cell row 'Revenue Uplift' col 'Q1 2024' shows '$1.2M' (should be '$1.8M'), cell row 'Revenue Uplift' col 'Q3 2024' shows '$2.9M' (should be '$3.3M'). The four 'Our Team' slides are at original positions 20-23 with titles: 'Our Team: Leadership', 'Our Team: Senior Partners', 'Our Team: Industry Experts', 'Our Team: Client Engagement'. After the restructuring, these should be at positions 3-6 (after title at 1, new 'At a Glance' slide at 2). The new 'Meridian Strategy Group: At a Glance' slide must be at position 2 and contain a 5-row x 3-column table with headers 'Metric', '2023', '2024 YTD' and data: Fortune 500 Clients (47, 52), Total Revenue ($340M, $285M), Client Retention Rate (94%, 96%), Avg Engagement Value ($2.7M, $3.1M), Employee NPS Score (72, 78). The footer 'CONFIDENTIAL — Meridian Strategy Group 2024' must appear on all 25 non-title slides. The email 'contact@apexconsulting.com' on the Thank You slide must be changed to 'contact@meridianstrategy.com'. The final deck must have exactly 26 slides and be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/presentations/meridian_pitch_final.pptx' without modifying the original.
